issue.errorLine1:
<string name="accessibility_service_description">To perform certain actions (such as locking your phone) when performing a gesture, Lawnchair requires accessibility access.

Lawnchair doesn't watch any user action, though the privilege to do so is required for all accessibility services. Lawnchair discards any event sent by the system.

In order to lock your phone, or to open the Recents screen, Lawnchair uses the performGlobalAction Accessibility service.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="dt2s_a11y_hint">To use Double-Tap to Sleep, turn on the Lawnchair accessibility service. Tap \"Open settings\", select \"Lawnchair\" and turn on \"Use Lawnchair.\"\n\nLawnchair uses Accessibility\'s `performGlobalAction` method to perform this action. This is a sensitive permission that allows monitoring other apps. However, Lawnchair is not configured for that functionality and receives no events.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="recents_a11y_hint">To use Open Recents screen, turn on the Lawnchair accessibility service. Tap \"Open settings\", select \"Lawnchair\" and turn on \"Use Lawnchair.\"\n\nLawnchair uses Accessibility\'s `performGlobalAction` method to perform this action. This is a sensitive permission that allows monitoring other apps. However, Lawnchair is not configured for that functionality and receives no events.</string>
